# Damien Herlihy — A Digital Universe

> Damien Herlihy is an Australian language teacher and learner — TESOL-trained, a former IELTS examiner and EAP teacher, co-founder of TEC (a language school in Trat, Thailand), and creator of Language Layouts. This site is his "digital universe": a digital garden of notes, essays and patterns on language teaching, learning how to learn, AI in education, and personal knowledge management.

## About
- Who: Damien Herlihy — teacher and learner of languages, writer, video maker. Based in Brisbane, Australia.
- Background: CELTA (London), Master of TESOL, English-for-Academic-Purposes teacher in Melbourne (also IELTS examiner and action researcher). Co-founded TEC in Trat, Thailand; now runs Language Layouts.
- Ethos: a pushback against an inauthentic, AI-flattened internet — inspired by Maggie Appleton's "digital gardens".

## How the site is organised
Posts are "celestial bodies":
- Galaxy (Essay) — long-form synthesis
- Constellation (Pattern) — recurring patterns and ideas
- Star (Note) — short, evolving notes
- Library — notes on books and resources

Categories: AI & Teaching · Learning How to Learn · Personal Knowledge Mgt · Languages · Second Mountain
